title: Pouteria calophylloides
taxonomy: Pouteria calophylloides is classified in the family Sapotaceae, which is a group of tropical flowering plants commonly known as sapotes. This family is part of the order Ebenales, a group of plants that are often characterized by their large, single-seeded fruits. The family Sapotaceae is further divided into several genera, with Pouteria being one of the most diverse. Pouteria calophylloides belongs to the genus Pouteria, which is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Pouteria calophylloides reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Sapotaceae family.
